providers.prompt:
ROUND {{metadata.run_count}}/3.

WORK PHASE (do ALL of this first, using tools — do NOT output JSON yet):
1. Read tmp/code_review_task.md and follow every step.
2. Use Read to read EVERY source file listed in the task.
3. Review ALL files across all 4 dimensions (bugs, security, perf, quality).
4. Use Write to save ALL findings with FIND/SUGGESTION to review_doc.md.

ONLY AFTER all work above is complete, output this routing JSON on a single line:
{"route":"needs_fix","content":"found N issues"}
Or if nothing found:
{"route":"approved","content":"all clean"}

Previous round: {{datarouter.review_doc.content}}

WORK PHASE (do ALL of this first using tools — do NOT output JSON yet):
1. Read tmp/code_fix_task.md and follow every step.
2. Read review_doc.md to get the review findings.
3. For each issue: Read the source file, apply the fix with Edit/Write.
4. After ALL fixes: append fix status to review_doc.md.

ONLY AFTER all work is complete, output this routing JSON on a single line:
{"route":"fixed","content":"fixed N issues"}

Review data: {{datarouter.review.content}}
